name: Render
description: Render provides cloud hosting for web services, static sites, background workers, cron jobs, and managed databases. Use this API to create and manage services, trigger deployments, and configure environment variables for your hosted applications.

capabilities.name: list_services
capabilities.description: List all services in your Render account. Returns service names, IDs, types (web_service, static_site, worker, cron_job), and current status.

capabilities.name: get_service
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific service including its type, repository, branch, build command, start command, and current deploy status.

capabilities.name: create_service
capabilities.description: Create a new service on Render. Specify the service type, name, Git repository, build and start commands, and environment configuration.

capabilities.name: trigger_deploy
capabilities.description: Trigger a new deploy for a service. Optionally clear the build cache to force a clean rebuild.

capabilities.name: list_deploys
capabilities.description: List all deploys for a specific service. Returns deploy IDs, statuses, commit information, and timestamps.

capabilities.name: get_environment_variables
capabilities.description: Get all environment variables configured for a service. Returns variable keys and values.

capabilities.name: update_environment_variable
capabilities.description: Update the value of an existing environment variable for a service. The service will automatically redeploy with the new value.
